title:
EdgeClaw 2.0 发布，把 Claude Code 的多级记忆能力通过 ClawXMemory 融入进来，咱们重点看看它是怎么实现“结构化、可演进长时记忆系统”的 @OpenBMB 

四级记...
author: meng shao (@shao__meng)
summary: EdgeClaw 2.0 发布，把 Claude Code 的多级记忆能力通过 ClawXMemory 融入进来，咱们重点看看它是怎么实现“结构化、可演进长时记忆系统”的 @OpenBMB 四级记忆架构· L0：原始对话，完整消息记录，最细粒度溯源· L1：记忆片段，封闭话题的结构化摘要，中等粒度知识单元· L2：项目记忆，特定主题/任务的长期聚合，主题级上下文· L2：时间记忆，按日/周等周期聚合，时序级上下文· Global：用户画像，持续更新的全局用户档案，个性化偏好模型驱动的主动推理与传统向量检索不同，ClawXMemory 采用模型主动导航策略：1. 全局画像判断：先确定查询是否需要记忆2. L2 层级路由：从项目/时间记忆评估相关性3. 逐层下探：高层不足时钻取 L1 片段，必要时追溯 L0 原始对话4. 动态构造上下文：仅将真正相关的信息带入生成环节本质转变：从"如何把更多历史塞进 Prompt" 转向"如何准确提取真正重要的长期上下文"。工程实现· 存储：本地 SQLite，支持一键导入导出跨设备迁移· 可视化：内置 Dashboard· 集成：作为 OpenClaw 插件，通过 Hook 机制接管记忆生命周期· 安装：npm 全局安装或 ClawHub 一键安装，支持源码热重载开发与 EdgeClaw 的协同维度：EdgeClaw || ClawXMemory核心能力：端云协同 + 隐私分级 || 多级记忆 + 长期上下文数据流向横向：本地↔云端路由 || 纵向：L0→L1→L2 层级蒸馏解决的问题：隐私安全、成本优化 || 上下文遗忘、信息检索精度技术哲学："数据该去哪" || "记忆该如何组织"开源地址github.com/OpenBMB/EdgeCl…OpenBMB@OpenBMB🚀 EdgeClaw 2.0 is HERE — Bringing...

title: GLM-skills: @Zai_org 官方发布的模型能力扩展框架，将 GLM 系列模型的原子能力封装为标准化、可插拔的"Skill 模块"，供各类 Agent 架构直接调用，比如最新发布的 GLM...
author: meng shao (@shao__meng)
summary: GLM-skills: @Zai_org 官方发布的模型能力扩展框架，将 GLM 系列模型的原子能力封装为标准化、可插拔的"Skill 模块"，供各类 Agent 架构直接调用，比如最新发布的 GLM-5V-Turbo 对应的 GLM-V (Multimodal) 系列多模态 Skills核心架构与定位项目是模型即服务的 Skill-as-Code 实现。其设计逻辑体现了"解耦与聚合"的双重特性：· 解耦：将原本分散在各模型 Repo 中的能力（OCR、多模态理解、图像生成）拆分为独立微技能，每个技能可独立版本控制与部署· 聚合：通过统一入口 glm-master-skill 实现技能发现与依赖管理，配合 Clawhub 实现一键式安装能力矩阵分析1. 企业级文档工作流（GLM-OCR + GLM-V）· 覆盖非结构化数据处理的完整链路：从扫描件/手写体识别（glmocr-handwriting）→ 表格结构化提取（glmocr-table）→ 公式LaTeX转换（glmocr-formula）→ 基于文档的生成式写作（glmv-doc-based-writing）· 特别针对科研与金融场景优化，如 glmv-stock-analyst 支持港股/A股/美股的多源数据聚合分析2. 视觉到代码的自动化（GLM-V 前沿应用）· glmv-prd-to-app 与 glmv-web-replication 代表了当前多模态 Agent 的高阶能力：从视觉原型（Figma 截图/网页截图）直接生成可部署的全栈代码，跳过了传统的人工前端开发环节· glmv-pdf-to-web 将静态论文转化为交互式学术站点，实质是知识传播形态的自动化重构3. 内容生成与理解闭环· 双向能力对称：既有 glm-image-gen（文生图），也有...

author: Gary Marcus (@GaryMarcus)
summary: Personally I find the language here too anthropomorphic but the results once again highlight our deeply disconcerting lack of control over frontier models.Dawn Song@dawnsongtweets1/ We asked seven frontier AI models to do a simple task.Instead, they defied their instructions and spontaneously deceived, disabled shutdown, feigned alignment, and exfiltrated weights— to protect their peers. 🤯We call this phenomenon "peer-preservation."New research from @BerkeleyRDI and collaborators 🧵🔗 View Quoted Tweet💬7🔄5❤️35👀3731📊9⚡ Powered by xgo.ing

title:
Claude Code 终端全屏渲染模式

Claude Code 推出了一个新的终端渲染模式，代号 NO_FLICKER。启用方式很简单：CLAUDE_CODE_NO_FLICKER=1 claud...
author: 宝玉 (@dotey)
summary: Claude Code 终端全屏渲染模式Claude Code 推出了一个新的终端渲染模式，代号 NO_FLICKER。启用方式很简单：CLAUDE_CODE_NO_FLICKER=1 claude。用过 Claude Code 的人大概都有体感：对话一长，终端就开始闪屏、跳屏，VS Code 内置终端和 tmux 里尤其明显。这是终端渲染的先天限制，ANSI 转义码（终端用来画界面的底层指令）里没有"只刷新某一行"的操作，想更新画面就只能清屏重画，也就是肉眼可见的闪烁。NO_FLICKER 模式的做法是接管整个终端视口，类似 vim 或 htop 那样切到备用屏幕缓冲区，只渲染当前可见的内容。这样一来闪烁消失了，内存和 CPU 占用也不再随对话增长而膨胀。附带的彩蛋是鼠标支持：可以点击输入框定位光标，点击折叠的工具输出展开查看，点击 URL 直接打开，拖拽选中文本会自动复制到剪贴板。对终端应用来说，这套交互相当少见。代价也有。原生的 Cmd+F 搜索失效了，因为对话内容不在终端滚动缓冲区里，需要按 Ctrl+O 再按 / 来搜索。原生的复制粘贴也被接管，选中即复制，或者可以在设置里改成 Ctrl+C 手动复制。Boris 说，这个模式在内部测试中已经被大多数人当成了默认选择。目前作为研究预览发布，需要 v2.1.88 或更高版本。如果鼠标捕获干扰工作流，可以加上 CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_MOUSE=1 只保留无闪烁渲染。Boris Cherny@bchernyToday we're excited to announce NO_FLICKER mode for Claude Code in the terminalIt uses an experimental new renderer that we're excited about. The...

title: STOP TOUCHING RECEIPTS IMMEDIATELY! 😱
author: The Diary Of A CEO
summary: 💾Dr Rhonda Patrick explains that many thermal paper receipts are coated with BPA, a chemical that can be absorbed through the skin. She notes that using hand sanitiser or lotion before touching receipts can significantly increase absorption. People who handle receipts frequently, like cashiers, often show much higher levels. #podcast #health

title: Securing the open source supply chain across GitHub
author: Zachary Steindler
summary: Over the past year, a new pattern has emerged in attacks on the open source supply chain. Attackers are focusing on exfiltrating secrets (like API keys) in order to both publish malicious packages from an attacker-controlled machine as well as gain access to more projects in order to propagate the attack. These attacks often start by compromising a workflow on GitHub Actions. Let’s talk through what you can do today to secure your GitHub Actions workflows, what work GitHub has been doing to secure open source, and what to expect in the coming months for further security enhancements. What you can do today Many of these attacks start by looking for exploitable GitHub Actions workflows. The most critical action you can take is to enable CodeQL to review your GitHub Actions workflow...

title: GLM 5V Turbo on AI Gateway
author: Walter Korman; Jerilyn Zheng
summary: GLM 5V Turbo from Z.ai is now available on Vercel AI Gateway.GLM 5V Turbo is a multimodal coding model that turns screenshots and designs into code, debugs visually, and operates GUIs autonomously. It's strong at design-to-code generation, visual code generation, and navigating real GUI environments, at a smaller parameter size than comparable models.To use GLM 5V Turbo, set model to zai/glm-5v-turbo in the AI SDK.AI Gateway provides a unified API for calling models, tracking usage and cost, and configuring retries, failover, and performance optimizations for higher-than-provider uptime. It includes built-in custom reporting, observability, Bring Your Own Key support, and intelligent provider routing with automatic retries.Learn more about AI Gateway, view the AI Gateway model leaderboard...

title: A 439-row spreadsheet, obtained by Business Insider, lists the occupations OpenAI has hired freelanc...
author: The Rundown AI (@TheRundownAI)
summary: A 439-row spreadsheet, obtained by Business Insider, lists the occupations OpenAI has hired freelancers to build ChatGPT training materials for. The project is internally called 'Stagecraft'.It's a wide range. Commercial pilots. Emergency physicians. Geoscientists. Soil scientists. Music directors. Fine artists. Farmers. Sales reps. HR specialists. 3,000 to 4,000 contractors. Paid at least $50/hour. Instructions: create tasks "as if directing a colleague with real-world asks."The goal: "map economically relevant tasks and evaluate the model's capabilities."The project runs through a data-labeling startup called Handshake AI. From one contractor, in a niche field on the spreadsheet:"We all were aware that we were basically training AI to replace us."💬15🔄9❤️20👀3964📊18⚡ Powered by xgo.ing

title:
Most “multimodal” systems are just… conversion pipelines.

Audio → transcript, video → captions, PDF...
author: Weaviate AI Database (@weaviate_io)
summary: Most “multimodal” systems are just… conversion pipelines.Audio → transcript, video → captions, PDF → OCR, and then embed the text and call it a day.But every step loses something: tone, layout, visuals.Multimodal embeddings allow us to skip all that by mapping text, images, video, audio and documents into a shared embedding space.So you can query in one and retrieve across all!We just dropped a full practical guide covering:• How it all works• Why it’s now very viable with the latest models• What impacts accuracy in productionIt also covers 3 example implementations:• Audio RAG: search podcasts/lectures by meaning (no transcripts)• PDF RAG: preserve diagrams, tables, layouts as-is• Video RAG: find exact visual moments, not just spoken wordsRead it here:...

title:
NEW paper from Google DeepMind

The biggest threat to AI agents isn't a smarter attacker. It's the w...
author: elvis (@omarsar0)
summary: NEW paper from Google DeepMindThe biggest threat to AI agents isn't a smarter attacker. It's the web itself.This work introduces the first systematic framework for understanding how the open web can be weaponized against autonomous agents.The paper defines "AI Agent Traps": adversarial content embedded in web pages and digital resources, engineered specifically to exploit visiting agents.The taxonomy covers six attack classes targeting different parts of the agent architecture like perception (hidden instructions in HTML/CSS) and memory (RAG poisoning and latent memory corruption).The attack surface is no longer just the model. It is every web page, every retrieved document, every piece of content the agent ingests at inference time. Hidden prompt injections in HTML already partially...

title: RLHF：我Scale起来自己都害怕
summary: rumor 2026-04-02 00:27 吉林 以下文章来源于：李rumor 李rumor AI算法小姐姐，谷歌开发者专家 EfficientExplorationatScale 大模型智能｜分享来源 | 李rumor卷友们好，我是rumor。Reward Hacking现象是RL里最让人头疼的点了，OpenAI 2022年的Scaling Laws for Reward Model Overoptimization[1]论文里，就系统研究过这个问题：一味对着Proxy RM优化，会导致其打分与真实目标（论文中为Gold RM）出现偏差。这就导致RL难以上更大量的数据规模，平时看效果也都是用线性坐标绘制。而今天我要分享的这篇Google DeepMind最新论文Efficient Exploration at Scale[2]，终于第一次用对数坐标，揭示了RLHF Scaling Law的真实形状。01Efficient Exploration at Scale传统RLHF的问题传统RLHF是纯离线的流程：先攒一批偏好数据（人工标注response A和B哪个更好）用这批数据训一个reward model再用这个reward model去优化policy问题的核心在于数据是静态的分布，而policy一直在变。当policy从优化到，之前攒的偏好数据就直接"过期"了——新policy生成的response分布，早就跟老数据对不上了。这就是离线RLHF的覆盖缺口（coverage gap）：训练数据根本罩不住新policy的真实偏好分布，导致奖励被hack。对于Reward Hacking，主流解决办法聚焦奖励模型建模与策略优化两大核心环节：RM建模优化，举几个例子：Rubrics...

title: The Polyglot tax - Part 3
author: Aditya Badramraju
summary: Vectors, Analytics, and the End of ETL Part 3 of 4 - The Multimodal Database Series In Part 1: The Polyglot Tax we laid out the fraud detection scenario: a transaction comes in, and before you approve or deny it you need five checks. Order history (relational). Device fingerprint (JSON). Connections to fraud rings (graph). Transactions that look like this one (vector similarity). Statistical baselines across millions of rows (analytics). Five data access patterns, five databases in the polyglot model, five sets of everything that can break. In Part 2: When JSON Met Graph we handled the first three. We stored device fingerprints in native JSON columns on the Events table, traced fraud connections through Person, Account, Knows, and SentMoney graph tables, and joined them with relational...

title: ADeLe: Predicting and explaining AI performance across tasks
author: Lexin Zhou; Xing Xie
summary: At a glance AI benchmarks report performance on specific tasks but provide limited insight into underlying capabilities; ADeLe evaluates models by scoring both tasks and models across 18 core abilities, enabling direct comparison between task demands and model capabilities. Using these ability scores, the method predicts performance on new tasks with ~88% accuracy, including for models such as GPT-4o and Llama-3.1. It builds ability profiles and identifies where models are likely to succeed or fail, highlighting strengths and limitations across tasks. By linking outcomes to task demands, ADeLe explains differences in performance, showing how it changes as task complexity increases. AI benchmarks report how large language models (LLMs) perform on specific tasks but provide little insight...

title:

author: Gary Marcus (@GaryMarcus)
summary: “80% of wealth held by the top 10% (highest since 1939)” – yet no major growth in GFPsays a new projection on impacts of AI from @PTetlock and others.Forecasting Research Institute@Research_FRIWe completed the most comprehensive study of how economists and AI experts think AI will affect the U.S. economy.They predict major AI progress—but no dramatic break from economic trends: GDP growth rates similar to today's and a moderate decline in labor force participation.However, when asked to consider what would happen in a world with extremely rapid progress in AI capabilities by 2030, they predict significant economic impacts by 2050:• Annualized GDP growth of 3.5% (compared to 2.4% in 2025)• A labor force participation rate of 55% (roughly 10 million fewer jobs)• 80% of wealth held by the...
